name: threadify-workflows
description: Agent-native Threadify workflow recipes for approved scheduling, cross-post fallback, winner replication, X Article drafting, and granular Brain Sync.

interface.shortDescription: Run public-safe Threadify MCP workflow recipes.
interface.longDescription: Threadify Workflows gives Codex workflow recipes for approved creator operations through Threadify MCP. It covers daily post scheduling, X cross-post fallback preparation, weekly winner replication, draft-only X Article packet creation, and granular Brain Sync from approved source artifacts. The plugin is orchestration-only and does not include private generation prompts, account credentials, tokens, or live provider configuration.
defaultPrompt: Run the Daily Posts Heartbeat workflow
Prepare an X-ready fallback artifact after a Threads post
Turn an approved daily post into a draft-only X Article packet
Run Personal Brain Sync from an approved source packet
